sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: Short Interest in Johnson Controls International plc (NYSE:JCI) Declines By 31.1%
feed.summary: Johnson Controls International plc (NYSE:JCI) experienced a 31.1% decrease in short interest as of January 30th, totaling 8,615,158 shares, with a short-interest ratio of 1.9 days. The company holds a "Moderate Buy" consensus rating from analysts, with several firms raising their price targets. Large institutional investors have increased their stakes, while insider activity shows both buying and selling of shares.

feed.title: Kenvue Inc. (NYSE:KVUE) Sees Significant Decrease in Short Interest
feed.summary: Kenvue Inc. (NYSE:KVUE) experienced a substantial 29.3% decrease in short interest, bringing the total to 52,530,388 shares as of January 30th, resulting in a short-interest ratio of 0.9 days. This decline comes as Director Jeffrey C. Smith increased his stake by purchasing 3,200,000 shares. The company also declared a quarterly dividend of $0.2075, offering a 4.4% yield.

feed.title: RBC Capital Sticks to Its Hold Rating for Paccar (PCAR)
feed.summary: RBC Capital analyst Nicholas Housden maintained a Hold rating on Paccar (PCAR) with a price target of $125.00, while Morgan Stanley also issued a Hold rating. In contrast, Bank of America Securities maintained a Buy rating for Paccar. Paccar's latest quarterly earnings showed a revenue of $6.82 billion and a net profit of $556.9 million, a decrease from the previous year, and insider sentiment on the stock is negative due to increased selling activity.

feed.title: Why Generac (GNRC) Is Up 22.3% After Data Center-Focused 2026 Outlook And New Buyback Plan
feed.summary: Generac (GNRC) saw a 22.3% stock increase after announcing a data center-focused 2026 outlook and a new US$500 million share repurchase program, despite a weaker Q4 and full-year 2025. The company is shifting its investment narrative from residential generators to energy technology for data centers and grid resiliency, targeting mid-teens net sales growth and an 8.0%–9.0% net income margin for 2026. This strategic pivot aims to capitalize on accelerating data center demand and AI infrastructure power solutions, although risks like capital expenditure for generator capacity expansion and tightening diesel regulations remain.

feed.title: Why Charles River (CRL) Faces Sector Cancellation Jitters and Governance Scrutiny at the Same Time
feed.summary: Charles River Laboratories International (NYSE:CRL) is experiencing increased pressure due to rising project cancellations in the life sciences sector and a new investor rights law firm probe into potential fiduciary duty breaches. These issues, alongside an upcoming CEO transition, add complexity to the company's investment narrative ahead of its Q4 2025 earnings release. Despite these concerns, the company projects significant revenue and earnings growth by 2028, with some analysts also offering more pessimistic forecasts.

feed.title: S&P Global stock price rises 3% into holiday weekend as insider buy hits tape
feed.summary: S&P Global Inc. saw its stock price rise by 3.11% to $409.54 on Friday, recovering some ground after a rough start to February. This surge came after a board member, Hubert Joly, bought 2,500 shares, and was also influenced by declining Treasury yields following softer-than-expected U.S. consumer price data. The company had previously dropped its 2026 outlook and will face further scrutiny regarding AI disruption risks and upcoming economic updates.

feed.title: |【即時新聞】iShares LDRH ETF宣布月配息0.1376美元，殖利率6.61%
feed.summary: |BlackRock's iShares has announced a monthly dividend of $0.1376 per share for its iShares iBonds 1-5 Year High Yield and Income Ladder ETF (LDRH). This high-yield bond ETF, which uses a laddered investment strategy, recorded a 30-day SEC yield of 6.61% as of January 30, offering stable cash flow for investors. The announcement provides key financial details crucial for investors evaluating the ETF's performance and income generation.

feed.title: Should Raytheon’s Coyote Counter‑Drone Wins and Dividend Hike Reset the RTX (RTX) Risk‑Reward Debate?
feed.summary: RTX Corporation's Raytheon business recently achieved success with its Coyote Block 3 Non-Kinetic system against drone swarms and declared a quarterly dividend of US$0.68. These developments, along with a major U.S. Army counter-drone contract and manufacturing gains, highlight RTX's focus on advanced defense and aerospace solutions and commitment to shareholder returns. The article discusses how these advancements and the dividend hike might influence the investment narrative and risk-reward balance for RTX.

feed.title: Martin Marietta’s Earnings Call Signals Growth Momentum
feed.summary: Martin Marietta Materials reported record financial, operational, and safety performance for 2025, driven by strong aggregates growth and specialized segment success. The company's 2026 guidance is highlighted as conservative, anticipating continued growth from infrastructure and data center demand despite headwinds in private construction and downstream segments. Management also emphasized disciplined capital allocation, a strong balance sheet, and a focus on efficiency gains to drive future shareholder value.

feed.title: Procter & Gamble stock price: PG shares slip as Italy ad probe and insider sale set up a key week
feed.summary: Procter & Gamble (PG) shares slipped by 0.7% to $160.07 on Friday, following news of an Italian antitrust probe into its Braun Skin i-Expert epilator ads and an insider selling 36,093 shares. The company faces a potentially messy near-term outlook with the ongoing probe and uncertainty surrounding inflation and interest rate impacts on consumer stocks, as it prepares for its next quarterly dividend and upcoming analyst presentations.

feed.title: Bridgeline Digital Earnings Call Highlights HawkSearch Momentum
feed.summary: Bridgeline Digital's Q1 earnings call revealed cautious optimism, driven by the expanding adoption of its HawkSearch and AI products, increasing recurring revenue, and a return to positive adjusted EBITDA. Core product revenue, led by HawkSearch, grew 17% quarter-over-quarter, now accounting for 60% of total revenue. While overall revenue growth was modest at 2.6% year-over-year, the company emphasized strengthening product fundamentals and improved profitability metrics, positioning it for more durable, profitable growth.

feed.title: Assessing KeyCorp (KEY) Valuation After Recent Share Price Pullback And Longer Term Gains
feed.summary: KeyCorp (KEY) has experienced a mix of short-term share price pullback and longer-term gains, with a 6.5% decline over the past week but a 28.4% total return over the last year. Despite a recent share price of $21.70, analysis suggests the stock might be undervalued by 10.6% based on a "narrative fair value" of $24.29, driven by expected improvements in net interest income. However, its P/E ratio of 14.2x is slightly above peers, prompting investors to consider whether current expectations are already factored into the price.

feed.title: Xcel Energy tells Colorado customers to prepare for possible power shutoffs due to fire danger
feed.summary: Xcel Energy has warned Colorado customers to prepare for potential power shutoffs due to an increased fire danger caused by low snowpack, warm weather, and dry vegetation. The National Weather Service issued a Red Flag Warning for the eastern plains, predicting critical fire weather conditions. Xcel advises customers using medical equipment to enroll in their "Safe for Colorado" program for additional communication during outages, and Denver Water is reporting low reservoir levels, hinting at possible water restrictions later in the year.

feed.title: Youdao Inc Earnings Call Highlights AI-Led Growth
feed.summary: Youdao Inc. reported solid top-line acceleration, record AI-driven subscription growth, and its first full year of positive operating cash flow for 2025. Despite challenges in smart device sales and marketing margins, the company is optimistic about sustained momentum into 2026 due to its AI-native strategy and diversified revenue. Management projects double-digit growth for Learning Services and continued acceleration in Online Marketing, alongside scaling AI subscriptions and improving profitability.

feed.title: Realty Income stock near a 52-week high: what to watch before Tuesday’s reopen and Feb. 24 earnings
feed.summary: Realty Income Corp (NYSE: O) finished Friday near a 52-week high, driven by hopes of a Fed rate cut after lighter-than-expected January consumer price increases. The company is set to release its Q4 and full-year 2025 earnings after the bell on February 24th, with investors keenly watching funds from operations (FFO) and commentary on 2026 acquisition plans. The primary risk remains a reversal in bond yields, which could raise funding costs and impact dividend growth for the net-lease REIT.

feed.title: Wabtec Earnings Call Highlights Growth, Cash and Backlog
feed.summary: Wabtec's Q4 earnings call showcased strong revenue and adjusted EPS growth, record cash generation, and an expanding backlog for 2025. Despite headwinds from tariffs and weaker railcar demand, the company demonstrated confidence through increased dividends, share repurchases, and positive 2026 guidance, emphasizing successful integrations and cost savings. Acquisitions, particularly in digital, and a focus on sustainable rail solutions also contributed to positive financial performance.

feed.title: Intuit stock holds near $399 as AI fears dog software ahead of Feb. 26 earnings
feed.summary: Intuit (NASDAQ:INTU) shares are trading around $399, down roughly 40% year-to-date, as the software sector grapples with "AI scare trade" fears. The company is set to release its fiscal Q2 earnings on February 26, with investors keenly awaiting management's perspective on AI's impact on demand and pricing. The upcoming earnings call will focus on the stability of consumer tax filing and small-business product demand, as well as the potential of new initiatives to offset any sluggishness in other segments.

feed.title: McDonald’s stock price dips after a late-week swing as upgrades collide with a busy macro calendar
feed.summary: McDonald's stock dipped on Friday, falling 1.4% to $327.58, despite recent analyst upgrades. The retreat occurred just before a holiday-shortened trading week, with investors anticipating Federal Reserve minutes, PCE data, and Q4 GDP numbers. McDonald's reported strong Q4 global comparable sales and increased its quarterly dividend, but faces headwinds from cost inflation and tough winter weather.

feed.title: Take-Two stock bounces Friday, but AI fears and GTA VI timing keep TTWO in focus
feed.summary: Take-Two (TTWO) stock closed up 1.7% on Friday, recovering after a two-day decline, as investors weigh AI-disruption concerns against the anticipated release of Grand Theft Auto VI. Despite a positive Q3 earnings report and increased fiscal guidance, fears persist about AI's potential impact on game development, evidenced by a previous drop after Google's "Project Genie" announcement. However, analysts and company executives downplay the immediate threat of AI replacing complex game engines, emphasizing that GTA VI's launch remains the key near-term catalyst.

feed.title: Investors Swim Against the Tide as WisdomTree’s BTCW Sees Big Inflows Into a Falling Bitcoin Market
feed.summary: Despite a significant drop in Bitcoin's price, WisdomTree's Bitcoin Fund (BTCW) experienced $6.78 million in net inflows on February 12, 2026, boosting its assets under management to approximately $123.1 million. This substantial inflow, representing about 5.5% of its total AUM, suggests that some investors are leveraging the ETF to accumulate Bitcoin at lower prices, looking past short-term volatility. The fund's accumulation highlights a strategic positioning by investors, even as Bitcoin's price faces bearish technical signals.

feed.title: Short Interest in IRSA Inversiones Y Representaciones S.A. (NYSE:IRS) Decreases By 33.3%
feed.summary: Short interest in IRSA Inversiones Y Representaciones S.A. (NYSE:IRS) decreased by 33.3% to 209,010 shares as of January 30, representing 0.4% of shares and a short-interest ratio of 1.0 days. Analyst ratings are mixed, with a MarketBeat consensus of "Buy" and a $23.00 price target, despite a recent downgrade by Wall Street Zen and an upgrade by Itau BBA. The company reported strong fundamentals, including a P/E of 3.27 and an 85.84% net margin for the last quarter.

feed.title: First Trust Mid Cap Value AlphaDEX Fund (NASDAQ:FNK) Short Interest Update
feed.summary: Short interest in First Trust Mid Cap Value AlphaDEX Fund (FNK) significantly decreased by 32.2% in January, settling at 11,463 shares, representing about 0.3% of the stock. The fund recently increased its quarterly dividend to $0.2872, an annualized $1.15 with a 1.9% yield. FNK is trading at $60.77, within a 52-week range of $42.68-$61.27, and has a market cap of $218.8 million.

feed.title: Revolve group CEO Karanikolas sells $459k in shares By Investing.com
feed.summary: Revolve Group Inc. Co-CEO Michael Karanikolas sold approximately $459,315 worth of Class A Common Stock on February 11 and 12, 2026, through MMMK Development, Inc. This transaction occurred under a pre-arranged trading plan, leaving him with 123,000 direct shares and MMMK Development holding over 30 million Class B shares. These sales come amidst Revolve Group's expansion with a new flagship store and positive outlooks from investment firms like Jefferies, Stifel, and BTIG due to its technology and market position.

feed.title: A Look At Genuine Parts (GPC) Valuation After Recent Performance Shift
feed.summary: Genuine Parts (GPC) has been under scrutiny following recent performance shifts, with its shares closing at US$147.16. The company's valuation narrative suggests it is fairly valued around $147.11, bolstered by investments in digital capabilities and steady revenue growth. However, a differing view, based on its P/E ratio, indicates that the stock might be trading at a richer price compared to industry peers, suggesting investors are paying a premium for its consistency.

feed.title: Palo Alto Networks Climbs 4.8% This Week Before Tuesday’s Earnings Release
feed.summary: Palo Alto Networks (PANW) saw its stock climb 4.8% this week before its Q2 fiscal 2026 earnings release on Tuesday. The company recently completed two major acquisitions, CyberArk ($25 billion) and Chronosphere ($3.35 billion), signaling aggressive expansion into adjacent security markets, particularly in identity and cloud-native observability. Analysts have mixed sentiments, with some maintaining high price targets due to the CyberArk deal, while others have trimmed targets amid concerns about integration and organic growth.

feed.title: TreeHouse Foods: Investindustrial Completes $2.9 Billion Take-Private Acquisition
feed.summary: Investindustrial has finalized its $2.9 billion take-private acquisition of TreeHouse Foods. The all-cash transaction includes $22.50 per share and a contingent value right for potential litigation recovery. As a result, TreeHouse Foods will no longer trade on the New York Stock Exchange.

feed.title: Short Interest in Home Federal Bancorp, Inc. of Louisiana (NASDAQ:HFBL) Declines By 33.1%
feed.summary: Short interest in Home Federal Bancorp, Inc. of Louisiana (NASDAQ:HFBL) significantly decreased by 33.1% to 2,996 shares as of January 30th, representing a minimal short-interest ratio of 0.5 days. The company recently reported quarterly EPS of $0.54 on $6.02 million in revenue and declared a quarterly dividend of $0.135 per share, indicating a 2.9% yield. Analysts and Weiss Ratings currently maintain a "Hold" rating on HFBL stock.

feed.title: Short Interest in Healthcare Services Group, Inc. (NASDAQ:HCSG) Decreases By 30.5%
feed.summary: Healthcare Services Group (NASDAQ: HCSG) experienced a 30.5% decrease in short interest by January 30th, totaling 1,528,208 shares, which represents about 2.2% of the company's shares. The company recently reported strong Q4 earnings, beating consensus EPS estimates with $0.44 and achieving $466.7 million in revenue. Analysts currently rate HCSG as an average "Hold" with a price target of $22.00.

feed.title: Dividend, Buybacks and Losses Could Be A Game Changer For Core Natural Resources (CNR)
feed.summary: Core Natural Resources Inc. (CNR) reported increased Q4 2025 sales but also a net loss. Despite this, the company declared a quarterly dividend and completed a significant share repurchase program, aiming to balance capital returns with future operating plans. The article questions how these returns will be sustained against potential regulatory tightening and uncertain coal demand, highlighting both opportunities and risks for investors.

feed.title: A Look At CubeSmart (CUBE) Valuation After New Self Storage Venture And Debt Issuance
feed.summary: CubeSmart (CUBE) has recently made headlines with a US$250 million self-storage venture with CBRE Investment Management and a US$450 million unsecured note issuance. The stock shows a 5.35% 90-day return and a 9.07% year-to-date return, reflecting renewed investor interest despite longer-term declines. Simply Wall St's analysis suggests CUBE is currently undervalued at $38.61, with a fair value estimate of $41.53, based on anticipated improvements in net margins and FFO driven by expense discipline.

feed.title: Corning (GLW) Valuation Check After US$6b Meta AI Data Center Supply Deal
feed.summary: Corning (GLW) has secured a significant supply agreement with Meta, valued at up to US$6 billion, for fiber optic cables to be used in AI data centers. While the company has shown strong share price momentum and growth in its Optical Communications business, its current valuation of $132.90 per share is considered overvalued compared to its fair value estimate of $114.46. The article suggests that future growth in AI data centers, improved margins, and premium earnings multiples would be needed to justify the current stock price, while also noting risks like slowdowns in AI or solar demand and tariff tensions.

feed.title: Is It Too Late To Consider Arch Capital Group (ACGL) After A 195% Five Year Run?
feed.summary: Arch Capital Group (ACGL) has seen a significant 195% return over five years, leading investors to question its current valuation. Analyses suggest the stock is undervalued, with the Excess Returns model indicating a 57.6% discount and its P/E ratio of 8.07x being below the industry average and its calculated Fair Ratio of 11.47x. The article encourages investors to explore these analyses further and contribute to community discussions on the stock's future.

feed.title: Danaher stock closes lower ahead of holiday break as traders brace for Fed minutes, GDP and PCE
feed.summary: Danaher (DHR) shares closed lower for a second straight day, dropping 1.1% to $212.58, ahead of the Presidents Day holiday and key economic data releases. Traders are anticipating the Federal Reserve's meeting minutes, GDP figures, and the PCE price index, which could influence rate expectations and market sentiment. The company's management remains optimistic about a rebound in end markets for 2026, projecting low-single-digit core revenue growth for Q1 and 3-6% for the full year, despite potential headwinds from research budget pullbacks or renewed weakness in China.

feed.title: AT&T stock price slips into Presidents Day break as Fed minutes loom
feed.summary: AT&T shares slipped slightly ahead of the Presidents Day break, closing at $28.69, as investors anticipated upcoming Federal Reserve minutes and new inflation data. Despite January's cooler inflation numbers raising hopes for mid-year rate cuts, market watchers remain cautious about the pace of disinflation. The telecommunications giant previously announced strong Q4 2025 earnings, an ambitious fiber expansion plan, and maintained its attractive dividend payout, but faces potential challenges from persistent inflation and increased competition.

feed.title: Salesforce stock ends higher into Presidents Day break as Wall Street sizes up Feb. 25 earnings
feed.summary: Salesforce stock closed higher, up 2.3% at $189.72, ahead of the Presidents Day holiday weekend and its crucial earnings report on February 25. Investors are anticipating insights into CEO Marc Benioff’s AI strategy, especially regarding the financial impact of AI "agents" and remaining performance obligation growth. The software sector faces pressure from AI disruption worries, despite eased U.S. inflation data boosting rate-cut hopes.

feed.title: C.H. Robinson stock steadies after AI scare — insiders step in as traders brace for Tuesday
feed.summary: C.H. Robinson (CHRW) stock rebounded by 4.9% after an AI-driven selloff, prompted by a competitor's claims of significant freight volume increases using AI. Executives made open-market share purchases following the dip, and Barclays maintained an Overweight rating, viewing CHRW as an "AI disrupter." The company's annual filing acknowledged technological disruption and AI risks, with investors now watching for continued rebound and signs of how management addresses the AI concerns.

feed.title: Xperi Inc. (NYSE:XPER) is favoured by institutional owners who hold 75% of the company
feed.summary: Institutional investors hold 75% of Xperi Inc. (NYSE:XPER), indicating significant influence over the company's share price and serving as a vote of confidence in its future. The Vanguard Group, Rubric Capital Management, and BlackRock are among the largest shareholders, with the top 10 shareholders collectively owning about 52% of the company. Insiders hold a smaller but notable stake of US$5.2 million, and the general public owns 11%.

feed.title: Trend Tracker for (ASTL.WT) (ASTL.WT:CA)
feed.summary: This article provides an ASTL.WT:CA Trend Tracker report including AI-generated signals and ratings for Algoma Steel Group Inc. Common Share Purchase Warrants. It highlights current trading plans with a short near 0.81 and a stop loss at the same price, and rates the warrant's performance as Strong in the Near term, Weak in Mid term, and Weak in Long term. The article also lists numerous recent analytical reports related to ASTL.WT.

feed.title: (ASM) Advanced Trading Insights (ASM:CA)
feed.summary: This article provides advanced trading insights for Avino Silver & Gold Mines Ltd. (ASM:CA), recommending a long-term buy near 12.56 with a stop loss at 12.50. It includes AI-generated strong ratings for mid and long terms and references several recent analytical reports for the stock.

feed.title: McDonald’s stock: MCD pulls back from $335 high as Argus upgrades; traders watch new McCafé drinks
feed.summary: McDonald's (MCD) stock pulled back from a high of $335, closing at $327.58, despite an upgrade to Buy by Argus with a $380 price target, and a Jefferies price target increase to $375. The company is focusing on expanding its McCafé beverages, with a successful 500-store test showing increased sales and predictions for significant comparable sales growth from new CosMc's-inspired drinks. Investors are also anticipating the return of seasonal items like the Shamrock Shake and upcoming macroeconomic data that could influence consumer stocks.

feed.title: Burlington to open new Cincinnati store this spring
feed.summary: Burlington Stores, Inc. announced it will open its tenth Cincinnati-area location in spring 2026 at the Hyde Park Plaza, formerly a Joann Fabrics space. This will be the 35th Burlington store in Ohio, reflecting the company's continued growth as a national off-price retailer. The store will offer discounted branded merchandise for families and homes, extending beyond its traditional focus on coats and outerwear.

feed.title: Is Pool Corp (POOL) Pricing Aligning With Mixed Returns And DCF Versus P/E Signals?
feed.summary: This article analyzes Pool Corp (POOL) stock valuation using discounted cash flow (DCF) and price-to-earnings (P/E) ratios. The DCF model suggests POOL is undervalued by 16.1% with an intrinsic value of $317.01 per share, while the P/E analysis indicates it is overvalued compared to its "Fair Ratio." The article highlights mixed short-term returns for POOL, but an overall 15.7% year-to-date increase.

feed.title: Is Pool Corp (POOL) Pricing Aligning With Mixed Returns And DCF Versus P/E Signals?
feed.summary: Pool Corp (POOL) has experienced mixed returns recently, with its stock up 15.7% year-to-date but down 21.5% over the past year. A Discounted Cash Flow (DCF) analysis suggests the stock is undervalued by 16.1% at $317.01 per share compared to its current price. However, its Price-to-Earnings (P/E) ratio of 24.1x is above its "Fair Ratio" of 15.7x, indicating it is overvalued by this metric.

feed.title: Analysts Offer Insights on Financial Companies: TransUnion (TRU) and Affiliated Managers (AMG)
feed.summary: This article highlights bullish sentiments from financial analysts on TransUnion (TRU) and Affiliated Managers (AMG). Morgan Stanley maintained a Buy rating on TransUnion with a $105.00 price target, noting the stock's potential upside. Barrington analyst Alexander Paris reiterated a Buy rating on Affiliated Managers with a $365.00 price target, also indicating significant upside based on analyst consensus.

feed.title: AG Paxton seeks information for BCBS; Conduent data breach
feed.summary: Attorney General Ken Paxton has issued a request for information following a data breach involving Conduent, a third-party vendor for Blue Cross Blue Shield of Texas. The breach, which occurred on January 19, 2024, exposed sensitive protected health information of nearly 50,000 BCBSTX members. Paxton's action aims to understand the scope and impact of the breach and ensure appropriate measures are taken.

feed.title: Bioventus Reports Second Quarter Financial Results
feed.summary: Bioventus has announced strong financial results for the second quarter of 2024, showing significant growth in revenue and profitability, particularly in its Pain Treatments and Surgical Solutions segments. Despite reporting a net loss due to an impairment charge and litigation costs, the company increased its adjusted EBITDA and raised its full-year financial guidance. Key strategic initiatives include the potential divestiture of its Advanced Rehabilitation Business and the FDA clearance of OSTEOAMP Cannula, aiming to enhance shareholder value and focus on core strengths.

feed.title: Sherwin-Williams paints big local presence with new distribution centre
feed.summary: Sherwin-Williams is constructing a massive 350,000-square-foot distribution center in Barrie, Ontario, on Dunlop Street West. This new facility is expected to create 200 to 250 jobs, solidifying Barrie as a significant hub for paint supplies and boosting local employment. Deputy Mayor Robert Thomson highlighted the city's efforts in attracting the company, emphasizing the positive economic impact and increased work-life balance for residents.

feed.title: FuelCell Energy, Inc. (NASDAQ:FCEL) Short Interest Update
feed.summary: FuelCell Energy, Inc. (NASDAQ:FCEL) saw a significant 33.4% drop in short interest in January, totaling 3,160,295 shares by January 30th. Analysts currently rate FCEL with an average "Reduce" consensus, and the company recently reported quarterly EPS of ($0.83), beating estimates, and revenue of $55.02 million. Insider selling by a director was also noted, alongside various institutional trades in the stock.

feed.title: Cemex Executes MXN$174 Million Share Buyback Under Ongoing Repurchase Program
feed.summary: Cemex (CX) repurchased 8 million Ordinary Participation Certificates on the Mexican market for MXN$174.1 million (approximately U.S.$10.1 million) on February 12, 2026. This transaction is part of an ongoing shareholder-approved buyback program, demonstrating the company's confidence in its valuation and commitment to returning capital to shareholders. Analysts currently rate CX stock as a "Buy" with a $14.00 price target, and TipRanks' AI Analyst, Spark, rates it "Outperform" citing strong financial performance and positive earnings-call guidance.

feed.title: METC Investors Have Opportunity to Lead Ramaco Resources, Inc. Securities Fraud Lawsuit
feed.summary: Rosen Law Firm is reminding purchasers of Ramaco Resources, Inc. (NASDAQ: METC) securities between July 31, 2025, and October 23, 2025, of an upcoming lead plaintiff deadline of March 31, 2026, in a securities fraud lawsuit. The lawsuit alleges that Ramaco made false or misleading statements regarding the development progress at its Brook Mine, overstating activity and failing to disclose the lack of significant mining operations. Investors who suffered damages due to these alleged misrepresentations are encouraged to join the class action.
